zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Carew III於大約1265年出生在英國波克夏姆爾斯福德時，他的父親Nicholas Carew II26歲，母親Dorothea Apulderfield26歲。他於1282年與Amicia Peverell在威爾士布洛可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1311年在他的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Carew III于大约1265年出生在英国波克夏姆爾斯福德时，他的父亲Nicholas Carew II26岁，母亲Dorothea Apulderfield26岁。他于1282年与Amicia Peverell在威尔士布洛可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1311年在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, James Patrick, Kieran.

Welsh (Pembrokeshire): habitational name from any of various minor places in Wales, in particular one near Pembroke with a major castle, named from Welsh caer ‘fort’ + rhiw ‘hill, slope’. The surname was taken to Ireland soon after the Norman invasion of England and was Gaelicized as de Carrún. In the 16th century a family called Carew from Devon played an important part in establishing the Tudor administration in Ireland.
Cornish (Somerset and Devon): from the cognate Cornish word kerrow (plural of ker ‘fort’), which occurs seven times as a placename in Cornwall.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Carew III was born about 1265, in Moulsford, Berkshire, England, his father, Nicholas Carew II, was 26 and his mother, Dorothea Apulderfield, was 26. He married Amicia Peverell in 1282, in Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1311, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Carew III est né environ 1265, à Moulsford, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Carew II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Dorothea Apulderfield, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Amicia Peverell en 1282, à Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1311, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Carew III um 1265 in Moulsford, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Carew II 26 und seine Mutter Dorothea Apulderfield 26. Er hat 1282 in Pembrokeshire, Wales Amicia Peverell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1311 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Carew III è nato il circa 1265 nel Moulsford, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Carew II, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Dorothea Apulderfield, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Amicia Peverell nel 1282, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1311, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Carew IIIが約1265年にイギリスバークシュアイアモウルスフォードで生まれた時，父Nicholas Carew IIは26歳，母Dorothea Apulderfieldは26歳であった。1282年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアでAmicia Peverellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1311年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Carew III(이)가 대략 1265년 영국 버크실르 모우스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Carew II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothea Apulderfield(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1282년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 Amicia Peverell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1311년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Carew III nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Moulsford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Carew II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Dorothea Apulderfield, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Amicia Peverell em 1282, em Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1311, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Carew III родился около 1265 г. в местности моулсфорд, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Carew II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothea Apulderfield, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicia Peverell в 1282 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1311 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Carew III nació aproximadamente 1265, en Moulsford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Carew II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Dorothea Apulderfield, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Amicia Peverell en 1282, en Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1311, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
